tagline: One prompt, many AI chats, one side panel.
manifest_description: Local-first AI compare workspace for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, and Grok in one browser side panel.
repo_description: Compare-first, local-first, browser-native AI compare workspace for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, and Grok, with a governed MCP sidecar for Codex and Claude Code browser workflows.
landing_title: Prompt Switchboard | Compare-first local AI workspace
landing_description: Prompt Switchboard is a compare-first, local-first, browser-native AI compare workspace for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, and Grok in one browser side panel, with a governed MCP sidecar for Codex and Claude Code browser workflows.
landing_og_description: Ask once, compare ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Qwen, and Grok side by side, keep the trust boundary in your browser, and move from install to first compare without tab juggling. The governed MCP sidecar stays optional after the product path is already clear.
current_install_surface: The supported install path today is the packaged GitHub Release zip.
store_ready_note: Browser-store submission materials are being kept ready, but GitHub Releases remains the supported install surface today.
marketing_alias_note: Future .ai or campaign domains should redirect to the canonical Prompt Switchboard homepage instead of replacing the primary product brand.
analysis_lane_note: Optional AI analysis can review a compare turn through a browser tab you already trust or, when available, through a separate local Switchyard runtime. It summarizes consensus and disagreement, recommends the best-fit answer to continue from, and drafts the next question as decision guidance without replacing the core compare-first lane. Direct browser API-key execution stays gated in this build.
mcp_sidecar_note: The local MCP sidecar exposes Prompt Switchboard product actions over stdio and a localhost bridge. OpenAI Codex and Claude Code are the strongest repo-specific bindings for that governed surface. This repo now also ships starter-kit generic MCP assets for OpenCode and OpenClaw, but those paths remain unverified host lanes until Prompt Switchboard ships a tested binding of its own. The sidecar does not expose arbitrary browser automation or a hosted relay.
workflow_lane_note: The built-in next-step workflow keeps seed-only actions distinct from real compare execution. Workflow snapshots remain session-scoped runtime cache instead of durable cold-start truth, and the workflow tool surface only supports run/list/get/resume inside that current browser session.
operator_helper_note: The repo-local operator helper wraps doctor, server, smoke, status, readiness, and workflow inspection for maintainers. It is not a public CLI product surface.
social_preview_alt: Prompt Switchboard social preview showing the compare-first browser extension.
social_preview_manual_check: Manually confirm the live GitHub Social Preview image whenever front-door visuals change.
